title: I am concerned about my SCHUFA...

messages.content: I am concerned about my SCHUFA score. Does DEW21 send my nationality, religious beliefs, or medical history to SCHUFA to calculate my creditworthiness? Also, where exactly (mailing address) can I send an objection to my data processing?

Based on the provided context, DEW21 does not process your nationality, religious beliefs, or medical history for the purposes of calculating your creditworthiness. The information that DEW21 processes includes customer contact details (e.g., name, address, email address, telephone number), data relating to the delivery location (e.g., meter number, identification number of the market location), consumption data, information about the supply period, billing data (e.g., bank account details), and data on payment behavior. This information is used for creditworthiness assessments.

For objections regarding your data processing, you can send your objection to DEW21 at:
- DEW21, Department VPK, Günter-Samtlebe-Platz 1, 44135 Dortmund
- By telephone: 0231.22 22 21 21
- By fax: 0231.544 30 02
- By email to: widerruf@dew21.de

Sources:
